task_completion.description: Verify the agent is logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Logged in as admin' or the username 'admin' in the top right corner of the Redmine interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Infrastructure & DevOps' in the project header, main title, or breadcrumb navigation (e.g., Projects » Infrastructure & DevOps).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct issue is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main heading of the page should display the issue subject: 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions'.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact required comment was successfully added to the issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the 'History' or 'Notes' section at the bottom of the issue page. The exact text starting with 'Phase 2 migration complete...' and ending with '...next sprint.' must be visible as a posted comment by the admin.

task_completion.description: Verify that no other issue fields (like status, assignee, etc.) were modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'History' section where the comment is posted, there should be NO bullet points indicating property changes (e.g., 'Status changed from New to In Progress') associated with the comment submission.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Firefox browser UI (address bar, tabs) containing the Redmine application, not a terminal window executing curl/API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Redmine web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a standard Redmine web page, not a text editor, raw HTML file, or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the comment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Issue Subject: 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions'. Expected Comment Text: 'Phase 2 migration complete: build and packaging jobs now running on GitHub Actions. Average build time improved from 18 minutes to 9 minutes. All artifact uploads verified. Proceeding to Phase 3 (deployment jobs) next sprint.'
